mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM payable_amount WHERE year = #{year} AND status = #{status}
SELECT * FROM payable_amount ORDER BY year DESC, company_id
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM payable_amount WHERE year = #{year}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM payable_amount pa LEFT JOIN company c ON pa.company_id = c.id
pa.year = #{year}
AND pa.payment_status =
0 1 2
AND c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
